---
name: Action doesn't work for me
about: An "Actionable Steps" recommendation isn't realistic for some population or context
title: "[Action] "
labels: action-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Which note and which action?

Filename and the specific action you're flagging.

## What's the situation?

Who is the action not working for, and why? Examples of useful detail: shift work, mobility limits, dietary restrictions, no access to outdoor light, caregiving constraints.

## Suggested alternative or modification

What would work for that population or context? If you have a primary source supporting the alternative, include it.
